author: wimet
content:
<@126385519469789184> Fixed all the bugs https://github.com/0xPolygonHermez/zisk/pull/1140. 
However, I had problems when generating the witness with zkevm-benchmark for the entire zkevm EEST tests from the execution-spec repo for the Osaka fork. Does anyone by any chance generated them? I was pointing to v4.1.0 <@774033563732541451> 

Would like to see if I can generate proofs for all of them, showing that zisk-eth-client is compliant

author: wimet
content: Since this takes a lot of time to generate, I am thinking on generating a single aggregated proof (probably after a SNARK wrapper for constant and small size) a ZisK proof of test compliance and publish it in the repo as a compliance artifact for every new release. What do you think?

author: omerfirmak
content: I started the CI run with PR changes. results will be on https://github.com/omerfirmak/zevm/actions/runs/27913985274/job/82595904854 when completed.
